rationale: Qodo free-tier limit notice is an external bot status message and does not request a code change.
Jira transition selection now writes transitionId and clears legacy targetStatus so submitted Tool inputs match the jira.transition_issue contract.
Codex review body is an informational summary; its actionable line comment is tracked separately.
Grouped trusted Tool choices now append into existing arrays instead of recreating arrays on every tool.
Gemini review body is an informational summary; its actionable line comment is tracked separately.
